summary: Solid, well-designed solution. Workflow correctly handles act limitations (artifact upload conditional, env var overrides at step scope to support test harness). Script shows excellent PowerShell patterns: [CmdletBinding()] on all functions, proper -LiteralPath, comment-based help, sensible exit codes (0=success, 1=error, 2=denied). Minor issues: script lacks explicit Set-StrictMode -Version Latest at module scope (best practice); Show environment step is diagnostic overhead (not wrong, but 6 lines of repetitive defaults could be cut). Dot-sourcing gate ($MyInvocation.InvocationName check) enables test mocking. Core Invoke-LicenseCheck accepts hashtable lookup, properly decoupling license resolution for testing. Actionlint should pass. Design supports per-case test overrides via env vars as required.
